# Harbor Design System

> A token-driven design system. Components are documented from their Figma source; every color, size, and type value resolves to a design token.

## Foundations

- [Token architecture](./foundations/overview.md)
- [Color](./foundations/color.md)
- [Typography](./foundations/typography.md)
- [Dimensions](./foundations/dimensions.md)

## Components

- [Button](./components/button.md): Buttons let people take an action, confirm a choice, or move forward in a flow.
- [Design Tokens](./components/designtokens.md): Harbor's values — colors, spacing, type, radii, shadows — live as design tokens, not
